jobs.title: Test Engineering Specialist (80 - 100%)
jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.

This position reports to:

Production Engineering Manager

__

Your role and responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to develop and maintain test infrastructures and test automations in accordance with business strategy to improve safety, efficiency, quality, and cost reduction. Each day, you will ensure existing test systems remain functional and up-to-date while designing new automated solutions for emerging products. You will also showcase your expertise by implementing innovative testing methodologies that enhance production standards and reduce costs.

The work model for the role is hybrid. #LI-Hybrid

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Maintaining and improving existing test systems, both hardware infrastructures and software automations, ensuring they meet current operational standards.

  • Designing new test systems for new products in compliance with specifications and manual test procedures, implementing automation wherever possible.

  • Providing support for the integration and startup of test systems, defining action plans and training relevant personnel.

  • Identifying and recommending opportunities for improving test processes and implementing related projects, ensuring adherence to safety requirements and evaluating new technologies.

Qualifications for the role

  • You have a minimum of 3 years of experience in UPS testing or commissioning, with proven expertise in test system development and maintenance.

  • Highly skilled in hardware design and automation software development, with the ability to create robust and efficient testing solutions.

  • Possess an enhanced knowledge of electrical infrastructures design and software development in C programming language.

  • You are passionate about workplace safety and technical documentation, ensuring all systems comply with safety requirements and are properly documented.

  • Degree in Electronic Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field.

  • You are at ease communicating in English, both written and spoken.

  • Nice-to-have: Knowledge of programming languages such as LabVIEW, Python, and C#, experience with programming IDEs like LabWindows CVI and VSCode, and familiarity with hardware design software such as Altium.

More about us

ABB Smart Power is a global technology leader, with products and solutions that make power supplies smart, connected, and protected. Its intelligent products and solutions make power more competitive by improving the energy efficiency, productivity, and reliability of almost any operation.

jobs.title: R&D Certification Engineer
jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.

This position reports to:

R&D Team Lead

__

General information

The R&D Certification Engineer plays a fundamental role supporting strategic technology direction working with the R&D Senior Certification Engineer, by assisting and leading part of certification activities and providing guidance to all departments on the application of standards and regulations related to ABB’s Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS) systems.

Reporting to the CoE Laboratory Manager, you will support the R&D Agile Team’s by performing assigned tasks, focusing on certification activities tasks using technical knowledge in a structured way.

Your responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain product certification for existing and new products, dealing with renewals and product design updates.
  • Develop and maintain all certification documentation, maintaining proper records, certification files, developing and improving these where necessary.
  • Work closely with product development team and manage test partners (UL, Intertek, Dekra, Eurofins, etc.) to scope and plan test programs to demonstrate compliance to IEC or UL applicable standards.
  • Carry out and monitor practical certification testing.
  • Constantly research the regulatory environment and facilitate discussions regarding changes in regulatory requirements.

Your background

  • Technician diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electronics or Electrotechnics.
  • Minimum 3 years of relevant engineering experience, including work with power electronic systems.
  • Knowledge of product regulations and standards (IEC, UL); familiarity with LCA and Environmental Sustainability is an advantage.
  • Experience working with certification bodies and conducting certification-related tasks.
  • Hands‑on experience with laboratory measurement equipment.
  • Ability to work independently on testing and certification activities.
  • Availability to perform certification tests in external laboratories (travel required).
  • Proficiency in Italian and English for effective communication. German is an asset.

Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.

Ready to make an impact?

Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer (80-100%)
jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Service Team Leader


Your role and responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to provide technical assistance to internal and external customers and ensure timely and cost-effective support in accordance with guidelines. Each day, you will contribute to customer satisfaction by executing support work according to customer expectations. You will also showcase your skill in customer service by ensuring customer retention through delivering high-quality customer experience

The work model for the role is: #LI-Hybrid

You will be mainly responsible for

  • Providing hardware support for ABB UPS (Uninterruptible Power Source) and PCS (Power Conditioning) products via our ticketing system, phone, or email, including supporting partners and subsidiaries through the 24/7 Diagnostic Centre rotation.

  • Performing complex system analysis for ABB UPS and PCS products and documenting your findings for relevant stakeholders.

  • Occasionally traveling to support customers, partners, and ABB subsidiaries with complex installations (such as large data centers), auditing service operations, and developing the competencies of local teams. As well as providing technical training on UPS and PCS products for customers and service engineers as required.

  • Interacting with other departments, such as Quality and R&D, to address product issues and drive continuous product improvement.

Qualifications for the role

  • A Bachelor's degree, Diploma, or higher academic qualification in Electrical or Electronic Engineering.

  • Several years of hands-on experience in commissioning, after-sales technical support, and advanced diagnostics of UPS, PCS, or energy storage solutions. Experience with ABB products is highly beneficial.

  • Demonstrated experience in commissioning and troubleshooting mission-critical applications such as data centers, high-volume industrial facilities, and critical infrastructure installations.

  • Proficiency in both verbal and written English communication (B2 level or higher). Knowledge of any other language is a welcome asset.

  • The ability to write clear and concise technical documents, reports, and field support procedures.

  • A good working knowledge of the MS Office package.

  • A willingness to engage directly with clients and teams worldwide, with a travel commitment of up to 15%.

  • Certification in quality and electrical safety standards (e.g., Six Sigma) is highly beneficial.

Some benefits

  • Flexible working hours

  • Hybrid working

  • ABB - SWIBECO benefits

  • More interesting ABB benefits



More about us

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

Ogni giorno, contribuirai alla soddisfazione del cliente eseguendo il lavoro di supporto secondo le aspettative del cliente. Mostrerai anche la tua abilità nel servizio clienti garantendo il mantenimento del cliente attraverso la fornitura di un'esperienza clienti di alta qualità. Il modello di lavoro per il ruolo è: #LI-Hybrid Sarai principalmente responsabile di: - Fornire supporto hardware per i prodotti ABB UPS (Fonte di Alimentazione Interrotta) e PCS (Condizionamento della Potenza) tramite il nostro sistema di ticketing, telefono o email, inclusi il supporto ai partner e alle sussidiarie attraverso la rotazione del Centro Diagnostico 24/7. - Eseguire analisi di sistema complesse per i prodotti ABB UPS e PCS e documentare i risultati per gli stakeholder rilevanti. - Occasionalmente viaggiare per supportare i clienti, i partner e le sussidiarie ABB con installazioni complesse (come grandi data center), auditing delle operazioni di servizio e sviluppo delle competenze delle squadre locali. L'esperienza con i prodotti ABB è altamente beneficiaria. - Esperienza dimostrata nella messa in servizio e nella risoluzione dei problemi di applicazioni mission-critical come data center, impianti industriali ad alto volume e installazioni di infrastrutture critiche. - Padronanza della comunicazione verbale e scritta in inglese (livello B2 o superiore). La conoscenza di qualsiasi altra lingua è un bene accetto. - La capacità di scrivere documenti tecnici, report e procedure di supporto sul campo chiari e concisi. - Buona conoscenza del pacchetto MS Office. - La volontà di impegnarsi direttamente con i clienti e le squadre in tutto il mondo, con un impegno di viaggio fino al 15%. - Certificazione in standard di qualità e sicurezza elettrica (ad esempio, Six Sigma) è altamente beneficiaria. ## Cosa offriamo - Orari di lavoro flessibili - Lavoro ibrido - Benefici ABB - SWIBECO - Altri interessanti benefici ABB ## Chi siamo ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione di energia per data center, impianti industriali e manifatturieri, infrastrutture critiche e edifici commerciali. Le squadre tecniche della Divisione lavorano strettamente con i partner dell'industria, fornendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portfolio della Divisione include interruttori di circuito industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento di motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L'unità di Protezione della Potenza supporta le più grandi aziende di data center del mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate e efficienti in termini di energia. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione è una piattaforma scalabile e facile da usare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Candidati oggi o visita www.abb.com per saperne di più su di noi e scoprire l'impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Bei ABB helfen wir Industrieunternehmen, schneller, schlanker und sauberer zu werden. Hier ist Fortschritt eine Erwartung - für Sie, Ihr Team und die Welt. Als globaler Marktführer geben wir Ihnen, was Sie brauchen, um es zu schaffen. Es wird nicht immer einfach sein, Wachstum erfordert Durchhaltevermögen. Aber bei ABB werden Sie nie allein stehen. Laufen Sie das, was die Welt am Laufen hält. Diese Position ist unterstellt: Teamleiter Service ## Aufgaben In dieser Rolle haben Sie die Möglichkeit, technische Unterstützung für interne und externe Kunden zu bieten und sicherzustellen, dass der Support rechtzeitig und kosteneffizient erfolgt, entsprechend den Richtlinien. Jeden Tag tragen Sie zur Kundenzufriedenheit bei, indem Sie Supportarbeiten entsprechend den Erwartungen der Kunden ausführen. Sie zeigen auch Ihre Fähigkeiten im Kundenservice, indem Sie die Kundenbindung durch die Bereitstellung eines hochwertigen Kundenerlebnisses sicherstellen. Das Arbeitsmodell für diese Rolle ist: #LI-Hybrid Sie sind hauptsächlich verantwortlich für: - Bereitstellung von Hardware-Support für ABB-UPS (Uninterruptible Power Source) und PCS (Power Conditioning)-Produkte über unser Ticketing-System, Telefon oder E-Mail, einschließlich des Supports für Partner und Tochtergesellschaften über die 24/7-Diagnosezentren-Rotation. - Durchführung komplexer Systemanalysen für ABB-UPS- und PCS-Produkte und Dokumentation der Ergebnisse für relevante Stakeholder. - Gelegentliche Reisen, um Kunden, Partner und ABB-Tochtergesellschaften bei komplexen Installationen (wie großen Rechenzentren) zu unterstützen, die Serviceoperationen zu überprüfen und die Kompetenzen der lokalen Teams zu entwickeln. sowie Bereitstellung von technischer Schulung zu UPS- und PCS-Produkten für Kunden und Serviceingenieure, wenn erforderlich. - Interaktion mit anderen Abteilungen wie Qualität und Forschung & Entwicklung, um Produktprobleme zu lösen und kontinuierliche Produktverbesserungen zu fördern. ## Anforderungen - Ein Bachelorabschluss, Diplom oder höherer akademischer Abschluss im Elektrotechnik- oder Elektronikingenieurwesen. - Mehrere Jahre praktische Erfahrung in der Inbetriebnahme, nachgelagerten technischen Support und fortschrittlichen Diagnose von UPS, PCS oder Energiespeicherlösungen. Erfahrung mit ABB-Produkten ist sehr vorteilhaft. - Nachweisliche Erfahrung in der Inbetriebnahme und Fehlerbehebung missionkritischer Anwendungen wie Rechenzentren, hochvolumigen industriellen Anlagen und kritischen Infrastrukturinstallationen. - Gewandtheit in der mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikation in Englisch (B2-Niveau oder höher). Kenntnisse einer anderen Sprache sind willkommen. - Fähigkeit, klare und präzise technische Dokumente, Berichte und Feldunterstützungsverfahren zu schreiben. - Gute Kenntnisse der MS Office-Pakete. - Wille, direkt mit Kunden und Teams weltweit zu arbeiten, mit einer Reiseverpflichtung von bis zu 15%. - Zertifizierung in Qualitäts- und elektrischen Sicherheitsstandards (z. B. Six Sigma) ist sehr vorteilhaft. ## Was bieten wir - Flexible Arbeitszeiten - Hybridarbeit - ABB - SWIBECO-Vorteile - Weitere interessante ABB-Vorteile ## Wer wir sind ABB Smart Power bietet Energiedistributionslösungen für Rechenzentren, industrielle und produzierende Anlagen, kritische Infrastruktur und Gewerbeimmobilien. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Branchenpartnern zusammen und liefern fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelle Wachstum, den Energiewandel und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio der Division umfasst industrielle Schaltanlagen, Niederspannungssysteme, Motorstartanwendungen und Sicherheitseinrichtungen wie Schalter und Relais. Die Power Protection-Einheit unterstützt die weltweit größten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen mit fortschrittlichen, energieneffizienten UPS-Lösungen. Der ABB Ability™ Energy Manager der Division bietet eine skalierbare, einfach zu bedienende Plattform, die Organisationen dabei hilft, Energie zu sparen und CO2-Emissionen zu reduzieren. Wir schätzen Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen. Könnte dies Ihre Geschichte sein? Bewerben Sie sich heute oder besuchen Sie www.abb.com, um mehr über uns zu erfahren und den Einfluss unserer Lösungen weltweit zu erfahren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à progresser - plus légères et plus propres. Ici, le progrès est une attente - pour vous, votre équipe et le monde. En tant que leader mondial du marché, nous vous donnerons ce dont vous avez besoin pour y parvenir. Ce ne sera pas toujours facile, la croissance demande de la détermination. Mais chez ABB, vous ne serez jamais seul. Courrez ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste est sous la responsabilité de : Chef d'équipe de Service ## Responsabilités Dans ce rôle, vous aurez l'opportunité de fournir une assistance technique aux clients internes et externes et de garantir un support rapide et économique conformément aux directives. Chaque jour, vous contribuerez à la satisfaction du client en exécutant le travail de support selon les attentes du client. Vous montrerez également votre compétence en matière de service client en assurant la rétention du client en fournissant une expérience client de haute qualité. Le modèle de travail pour ce rôle est : #LI-Hybrid Vous serez principalement responsable de : - Fournir un support matériel pour les produits ABB UPS (Source d'Alimentation Ininterrompue) et PCS (Conditionnement de Puissance) via notre système de tickets, téléphone ou email, y compris le support des partenaires et des filiales par le biais de la rotation du Centre de Diagnostic 24/7. - Effectuer une analyse de système complexe pour les produits ABB UPS et PCS et documenter vos résultats pour les parties prenantes pertinentes. - Voyager occasionnellement pour soutenir les clients, les partenaires et les filiales ABB avec des installations complexes (comme de grands centres de données), auditer les opérations de service et développer les compétences des équipes locales. ainsi que fournir une formation technique sur les produits UPS et PCS pour les clients et les ingénieurs de service, si nécessaire. - Interagir avec d'autres départements, tels que la Qualité et la R&D, pour aborder les problèmes de produits et promouvoir l'amélioration continue des produits. ## Exigences - Un diplôme de Bachelor, un diplôme ou une qualification académique supérieure en Génie Électrique ou Électronique. - Plusieurs années d'expérience pratique dans la mise en service, le support technique après-vente et la diagnostic avancée des UPS, PCS ou solutions de stockage d'énergie. L'expérience avec les produits ABB est très bénéfique. - Expérience démontrée dans la mise en service et le dépannage d'applications critiques telles que les centres de données, les installations industrielles à haut débit et les installations d'infrastructures critiques. - Maîtrise de la communication verbale et écrite en anglais (niveau B2 ou supérieur). La connaissance d'une autre langue est la bienvenue. - La capacité d'écrire des documents techniques, des rapports et des procédures de support sur le terrain clairs et concis. - Une bonne connaissance du package MS Office. - Une volonté d'engager directement les clients et les équipes à travers le monde, avec un engagement de voyage allant jusqu'à 15%. - La certification en normes de qualité et de sécurité électrique (par exemple, Six Sigma) est très bénéfique. ## Ce que nous offrons - Horaires de travail flexibles - Travail hybride - Avantages ABB - SWIBECO - Plus d'avantages intéressants ABB ## Qui sommes-nous ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d'énergie pour les centres de données, les usines industrielles et manufacturières, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la Division travaillent étroitement avec les partenaires de l'industrie, fournissant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent la croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la Division comprend des disjoncteurs de circuit industriels, des systèmes basse tension, des applications de démarrage de moteurs et des dispositifs de sécurité comme des interrupteurs et des relais. L'unité de Protection de Puissance soutient les plus grandes entreprises de centres de données du monde avec des solutions UPS avancées et efficaces en termes d'énergie. Le ABB Ability™ Energy Manager de la Division fournit une plateforme évolutive et facile à utiliser qui aide les organisations à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO2. Nous valorisons les personnes issues de différents horizons. Pourrait-ce être votre histoire ? Postulez dès aujourd'hui ou visitez www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur nous et découvrir l'impact de nos solutions à travers le monde.

jobs.title: R&D Senior Engineer Firmware (80 -100%)
jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Chapter Leader (Control Firmware)


Your Role and Responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research & Development (R&D) team.

Work model: #LI-Hybrid

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Firmware Development: Design, develop, and implement firmware for Power Electronic Converters and communication modules, ensuring robust functionality and cybersecurity.

  • Software Quality Assurance: Conduct unit, integration, and system testing to validate software performance and reliability.

  • Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with system architects and hardware/software engineers to translate system requirements into detailed firmware specifications.

  • Innovation and Knowledge Sharing: Contribute to intellectual property creation and collaborate with global engineering teams to drive continuous improvement and share expertise.

Qualifications for the Role

  • You are highly skilled in C/C++/Python/assembler backed by solid computer science fundamentals.

  • You have solid knowledge in structured development processes, ranging from requirement analysis, design, and implementation to test and documentation.

  • You have at least 5 years of experience in designing control firmware based on microcontrollers / DSPs for Power Electronic Products such as UPS, BESS, Renewable Energy systems.

  • Possess an enhanced knowledge of development infrastructure: Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, version control systems (git), lifecycle management, build systems, unit testing, debug probes, oscilloscopes, and similar tools.

  • Exposure to Cyber Security concepts and knowledge of main industrial communication protocols (Modbus, Ethernet/IP, IEC61850, Profibus, CAN bus) are a plus.

  • You are passionate about team working and innovation.

  • M.Sc. or B.Sc. degree in Information or Electrical, Power Electronic, Electronic Engineering, Embedded Systems, or comparable field

  • You are at ease communicating in English and Italian

More about us

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

Join us. Be part of the team where progress happens, industries transform, and your work shapes the world.
Run What Runs the World.

#ABBCareers #RunwithABB

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

Garanzia della Qualità del Software: Eseguire test di unità, integrazione e sistema per validare le prestazioni e la affidabilità del software. - Collaborazione Multifunzionale: Collaborare strettamente con architetti di sistema e ingegneri hardware/software per tradurre i requisiti di sistema in specifiche di firmware dettagliate. - Esperienza con concetti di sicurezza informatica e conoscenza di protocolli di comunicazione industriali principali (Modbus, Ethernet/IP, IEC61850, Profibus, CAN bus) sono un plus. - Sei appassionato di lavoro di squadra e innovazione. - Laurea triennale o magistrale in Informatica o Ingegneria Elettrica, Elettronica di Potenza, Elettronica, Sistemi Embedded o campo comparabile. - Ti senti a tuo agio a comunicare in inglese e italiano. ## Cosa offriamo ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione di energia per data center, impianti industriali e manifatturieri, infrastrutture critiche e edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorano strettamente con i partner dell'industria, fornendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio della Divisione include interruttori di circuito industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento di motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L'unità di Protezione Energetica supporta le più grandi aziende di data center del mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate e efficienti in termini di energia. La piattaforma ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione è una piattaforma scalabile e facile da usare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Unisciti a noi. Fai parte del team dove accade il progresso, le industrie si trasformano e il tuo lavoro forma il mondo. Corsi ciò che guida il mondo. ## Contatto #ABBCareers #RunwithABB Valutiamo le persone provenienti da diversi background. Potrebbe essere la tua storia? Candidati oggi o visita www.abb.com per saperne di più su di noi e scoprire l'impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.

Jeden Tag werden Sie innovative Lösungen für relevante Probleme identifizieren und umsetzen. Sie werden auch Ihre Expertise durch Ideen zeigen und in der Lage sein, sowohl eigenständig als auch als Teil eines Forschungs- und Entwicklungsteams (R&D) zu arbeiten. Arbeitsmodell: #LI-Hybrid Sie sind hauptsächlich verantwortlich für: - Firmware-Entwicklung: Design, Entwicklung und Implementierung von Firmware für Leistungselektronikwandler und Kommunikationsmodule, um robuste Funktionalität und Cybersicherheit zu gewährleisten. - Software-Qualitätsicherung: Durchführung von Unit-, Integrations- und Systemtests, um die Softwareleistung und Zuverlässigkeit zu validieren. - Interfunktionale Zusammenarbeit: Eng zusammenarbeiten mit Systemarchitekten und Hardware-/Software-Ingenieuren, um Systemanforderungen in detaillierte Firmware-Spezifikationen umzusetzen. - Sie sind hochqualifiziert in C/C++/Python/Assembler mit festen Informatik-Grundlagen. - Sie haben fundierte Kenntnisse in strukturierten Entwicklungsprozessen, die von der Anforderungsanalyse, dem Design und der Implementierung bis hin zu Test und Dokumentation reichen. - Sie haben mindestens 5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Entwicklung von Steuerungsfirmware auf Basis von Mikrocontrollern/DSPs für Leistungselektronik-Produkte wie UPS, BESS und Erneuerbare-Energie-Systeme. - Sie verfügen über erweiterte Kenntnisse in Entwicklungsinfrastrukturen: Azure DevOps, CI/CD-Pipelines, Versionskontrollsysteme (git), Lebenszyklusmanagement, Build-Systeme, Unit-Tests, Debug-Proben, Oszilloskope und ähnliche Tools. - Erfahrung mit Cybersicherheitskonzepten und Kenntnisse zu Hauptprotokollen der industriellen Kommunikation (Modbus, Ethernet/IP, IEC61850, Profibus, CAN-Bus) sind ein Plus. - Sie sind leidenschaftlich für Teamarbeit und Innovation. - M.Sc. oder B.Sc.-Abschluss in Informatik oder Elektrotechnik, Leistungselektronik, Elektronik, Embedded Systems oder vergleichbare Fachrichtung. - Sie sind sich wohl, auf Englisch und Italienisch zu kommunizieren. ## Was wir bieten ABB Smart Power bietet Energielösungen für Rechenzentren, industrielle und Produktionsanlagen, kritische Infrastruktur und Gewerbegebäude. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen und liefern fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelles Wachstum, den Energiewandel und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio der Division umfasst industrielle Schaltgeräte, Niederspannungssysteme, Motorstartanwendungen und Sicherheitseinrichtungen wie Schalter und Relais. Die Power Protection-Einheit unterstützt die größten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen der Welt mit fortschrittlichen, energieeffizienten UPS-Lösungen. Die ABB Ability™ Energy Manager-Plattform der Division bietet eine skalierbare, einfach zu bedienende Plattform, die Organisationen dabei unterstützt, Energie zu sparen und CO2-Emissionen zu reduzieren. Treten Sie uns bei. Seien Sie Teil des Teams, in dem Fortschritt stattfindet, Industrie umgestaltet wird und Ihre Arbeit die Welt prägt. Vous êtes hautement compétent en C/C++/Python/assembleur, soutenu par des fondamentaux solides en informatique. - Vous avez de solides connaissances en processus de développement structurés, allant de l'analyse des exigences, de la conception et de la mise en œuvre à l'essai et à la documentation. - Vous avez au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans la conception de firmware de contrôle basé sur des microcontrôleurs/DSP pour des produits électroniques de puissance tels que les UPS, les BESS, les systèmes d'énergie renouvelable. - Vous possédez une connaissance approfondie des infrastructures de développement : Azure DevOps, pipelines CI/CD, systèmes de contrôle de version (git), gestion du cycle de vie, systèmes de build, tests unitaires, sondes de débogage, oscilloscopes et outils similaires. - Une exposition aux concepts de cybersécurité et une connaissance des principaux protocoles de communication industrielle (Modbus, Ethernet/IP, IEC61850, Profibus, CAN bus) sont un plus. - Vous êtes passionné par le travail d'équipe et l'innovation. - Diplôme de M.Sc. ou B.Sc. en informatique ou en ingénierie électrique, électronique de puissance, électronique, systèmes embarqués ou domaine comparable. - Vous vous sentez à l'aise de communiquer en anglais et en italien. ## Ce que nous offrons ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions d'énergie pour les centres de données, les usines industrielles et manufacturières, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la Division travaillent étroitement avec les partenaires de l'industrie, fournissant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent la croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la Division comprend des disjoncteurs industriels, des systèmes basse tension, des applications de démarrage de moteurs et des dispositifs de sécurité comme des interrupteurs et des relais. L'unité de Protection d'Énergie soutient les plus grandes entreprises de centres de données du monde avec des solutions UPS avancées et efficaces en termes d'énergie. La plateforme ABB Ability™ Energy Manager de la Division offre une plateforme évolutive et facile à utiliser qui aide les organisations à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO2. Rejoignez-nous. Faites partie de l'équipe où le progrès se fait, les industries se transforment et votre travail façonne le monde. Courrez ce qui fait tourner le monde. ## Contact #ABBCareers #RunwithABB Nous valorisons les personnes issues de différents horizons. Pourrait-ce être votre histoire ? jobs.title: Test Engineer (80 - 100%)
jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Production Engineering Manager


Your role and responsibilities (Mandatory)

In this position, you will provide assistance in testing and verification activities on a range of assignments in the UPS products of ABB Smart Power in Quartino. You will be in charge of the testing and verification activities for low- and medium-complexity systems, subsystems, or products.

The work model for the role is hybrid. #LI-Hybrid

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Defining the troubleshooting procedure and troubleshooting level two, in case a new event occurs not covered by the troubleshooting procedure.

  • Maintaining, changing, and optimizing test instructions for mass production in consultancy with the R&D Engineer (Center of Excellence).

  • Providing technical support during the installation of test objects in the test area.

  • Assisting the Production Supervisor in defining and maintaining the skill matrix for test operators.


Qualifications for the role

  • At least 3 years of experience in UPS, working as a service technician, or in engineering, testing, etc.

  • Sound knowledge of engineering techniques, processes, and tools, including measurement with a power meter, oscilloscope, etc.

  • A strong focus on safe work practices and dedication to following workplace safety guidelines.

  • A high level of self-motivation, curiosity, and desire to learn about new technologies.

  • A collaborative, solution-focused approach, and strong written and spoken communication skills.

  • A degree in electrical/electronic or similar field · Fluent in English


More about us


ABB Smart Power is a global technology leader, with products and solutions that make power supplies smart, connected, and protected. Its intelligent products and solutions make power more competitive by improving the energy efficiency, productivity, and reliability of almost any operation.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

#MyABBStory

jobs.title: Process Quality Specialist (80-100%)
jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Quality Manager


Your role and responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to support the deployment of the quality strategy for a local organizational unit, including quality culture, systems, tools, and skilled teams, with the aim to meet customer expectations while ensuring sustainable operations. Each day, you will assist the organization in creating the right mix of prevention, continuous improvement, robust root cause analysis, quick response, and sustainable solutions to problems. You will also showcase your skills by collaborating with local functions that improve the quality of results to reach the targets for the organizational unit and aim for world-class performance.

The work model for the role is onsite. #LI-Onsite

This role is contributing to the Power Protection, Smart Power division in Quartino, Switzerland.

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Non-Conformities Management: Analyze non-conformities systematically to identify root causes and initiate cases in the Practical Problem Solving (PPS) tool to track corrective activities and ensure resolution.

  • PPS cases Management: Define containment, corrective, and preventive actions. Facilitate Level 2 Quality Circles and escalate critical cases to Level 3 when necessary.

  • Quality KPI Performance: contribute to the improvement of key quality metrics including First Pass Yield (FPY) manufacturing, Supplier PPM, Customer DPU, and overall Cost of Poor Quality (COPQ). Monitor and ensure timely closure of PPS cases.

  • Supplier Quality Management: Manage supplier non-conformities and identify top critical issues in collaboration with the Supplier Quality Manager to improve initiatives.

  • Production Support: Support Quality Technicians by identifying improvement opportunities to prevent non-conformities and minimize production disruptions.

  • Quality Gates Development: Develop new quality gates and continuously improve existing to enhance product quality and process control.

Qualifications for the role

  • Bachelor's degree or SSST in Electrical Engineering or related field.

  • Minimum five years of experience in quality or equivalent role.

  • Deep understanding of quality processes, including problem-solving methodologies and continuous improvement tools.

  • Communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to engage effectively with stakeholders at all organizational levels. Willingness to work beyond standard hours when required and ability to perform efficiently in demanding situations.

  • Demonstrated ability to manage tasks efficiently and collaboratively in a constantly evolving manufacturing environment characterized by regular adjustments and shifts.

  • Fluency in English and Italian (written and spoken).

  • Lean Six Sigma Green Belt certification is considered an advantage.



More about us

ABB Smart Power is a global technology leader, with products and solutions that make power supplies smart, connected, and protected. Its intelligent products and solutions make power more competitive by improving the energy efficiency, productivity, and reliability of almost any operation.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to read more about us and learn about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Bei ABB helfen wir Industrieunternehmen, effizienter und nachhaltiger zu werden. Hier ist Fortschritt eine Erwartung - für Sie, Ihr Team und die Welt. Aber bei ABB werden Sie nie allein sein. Laufen Sie, was die Welt antreibt. Diese Position ist dem Quality Manager unterstellt. ## Aufgaben Ihre Rolle und Verantwortlichkeiten In dieser Rolle haben Sie die Möglichkeit, die Umsetzung der Qualitätsstrategie für eine lokale Organisationseinheit zu unterstützen, einschließlich Qualitätskultur, Systemen, Tools und qualifizierten Teams, mit dem Ziel, die Erwartungen der Kunden zu erfüllen und nachhaltige Betriebsabläufe zu gewährleisten. Jeden Tag werden Sie der Organisation dabei helfen, das richtige Mix aus Prävention, kontinuierlicher Verbesserung, robuster Ursachenanalyse, schneller Reaktion und nachhaltigen Lösungen für Probleme zu schaffen. Sie werden Ihre Fähigkeiten durch Zusammenarbeit mit lokalen Funktionen zeigen, die die Qualität der Ergebnisse verbessern, um die Ziele der Organisationseinheit zu erreichen und eine Weltklasseleistung anzustreben. Das Arbeitsmodell für diese Rolle ist vor Ort. #LI-Onsite Diese Rolle trägt zur Power Protection, Smart Power Division in Quartino, Schweiz, bei. Sie sind hauptsächlich verantwortlich für: - Nicht-Konformitätsmanagement: Analysieren Sie systematisch Nicht-Konformitäten, um Ursachen zu identifizieren und Fälle im Practical Problem Solving (PPS)-Tool zu initiieren, um korrigierende Aktivitäten zu verfolgen und die Lösung sicherzustellen. - PPS-Fallmanagement: Definieren Sie Kontainierungs-, korrigierende und präventive Maßnahmen. Führen Sie Level 2 Quality Circles und eskalieren Sie kritische Fälle bei Bedarf auf Level 3. - Qualitäts-KPI-Leistung: tragen Sie zur Verbesserung der wichtigsten Qualitätsmetriken bei, einschließlich First Pass Yield (FPY) der Fertigung, Supplier PPM, Customer DPU und dem Gesamtkosten der mangelhaften Qualität (COPQ). Überwachen und stellen Sie sicher, dass PPS-Fälle rechtzeitig geschlossen werden. - Lieferantenqualitätsmanagement: Verwalten Sie Lieferantennicht-Konformitäten und identifizieren Sie die wichtigsten kritischen Probleme in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Supplier Quality Manager, um Initiativen zu verbessern. - Produktionsunterstützung: Unterstützen Sie Qualitätstechniker bei der Identifizierung von Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten, um Nicht-Konformitäten zu verhindern und Produktionsunterbrechungen zu minimieren. - Qualitätsgates-Entwicklung: Entwickeln Sie neue Qualitätsgates und verbessern Sie bestehende kontinuierlich, um die Produktqualität und den Prozesskontrolle zu erhöhen. ## Anforderungen Qualifikationen für die Rolle - Bachelorabschluss oder SSST in Elektrotechnik oder einem verwandten Bereich. - Mindestens fünf Jahre Erfahrung in der Qualitätssicherung oder einer vergleichbaren Rolle. - Tiefe Kenntnisse der Qualitätsprozesse, einschließlich Problembehandlungsmethoden und kontinuierlicher Verbesserungstools. - Kommunikations- und Interpersonalfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, effektiv mit Stakeholdern auf allen Ebenen der Organisation zu arbeiten. - Bereitwilligkeit, über die Standardarbeitszeit hinaus zu arbeiten, wenn erforderlich, und Fähigkeit, effizient in anspruchsvollen Situationen zu arbeiten. - Nachweis der Fähigkeit, Aufgaben effizient und kooperativ in einem ständig wechselnden Produktionsumfeld zu verwalten, das durch regelmäßige Anpassungen und Schichtarbeit gekennzeichnet ist. - Fließende Englisch- und Italienischkenntnisse (schriftlich und gesprochen). - Lean Six Sigma Green Belt-Zertifizierung wird als Vorteil angesehen. ## Was wir bieten Mehr über uns ABB Smart Power ist ein globaler Technologieführer mit Produkten und Lösungen, die Stromversorgung intelligent, verbunden und geschützt machen. Seine intelligenten Produkte und Lösungen machen Strom wettbewerbsfähiger, indem sie die Energieeffizienz, Produktivität und Zuverlässigkeit fast jeder Operation verbessern. jobs.description:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Service Sales Manager


Your role and responsibilities

You will have the opportunity to support ELSP Service Sales organization and customers during the proposal process and internal sales. You will support the local Sales organization and customers in determining the most technical appropriate and cost-effective solutions and in the preparation of demanding offers. Coordinate with Local Marketing & Sales Managers, Regional and Global roles and implement Sales initiatives with local sales organizations in ELSP Switzerland.

Work model: #LI-Hybrid

The main responsibilities include

  • Managing sales opportunities through CRM systems, calls, emails, and routing qualified leads to specialists.

  • Coordinating technical-commercial support by preparing offers, contracts, analyzing customer needs, and recommending improvements.

  • Collaborating cross-functionally to develop service offerings, generate revenues, and promote strategic programs.

  • Managing and developing key customers by leading relationships, implementing pricing strategies, and driving long-term growth.

Qualifications for the role

  • You have substantial experience in service sales and are highly skilled at excelling in the role.

  • Demonstrate effective commercial skills and promotional capabilities, with a focus on identifying business opportunities, engaging clients, and expanding market reach.

  • You have advanced skills in uninterruptable power systems or similar products with a motivated, customer-oriented approach.

  • Degree in electrical engineering (or related technical field).

  • You are at ease communicating in German and English.

  • Any further language like French or Italian are welcome.

  • You are available to travel across the country to support business and events, training.

More About us:

ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and

manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams

work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy

transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers,

low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions.

We look forward to receiving your application.
